Pipeline Maintenance History Download

to
Enter recent date in "Start Date" and past date in "End Date"

Maintenance will not appear in the archive until after it's been removed from the Operating Data | Pipeline Maintenance page above. You can download Redwood and Baja pipeline maintenance information as far back as November 1, 2016. You can download Limitations at Specific Interconnect Point information as far back as March 21, 2018. You can download Storage Maintenance information as far back as December 11, 2020.

Prospective Maintenance Document

Last revised: June 17, 2026

Download our Prospective Maintenance document for a 6-12 month outlook of proposed maintenance on the CGT pipeline system. Note that this document is revised monthly and is offered in addition to our existing month-out Pipeline Maintenance information listed above.

 

Report any accessibility barriers you encounter when using our site by contacting CGTPipeRanger@pge.com. The mailbox is monitored during our business hours (M-F; 6am-3pm PT).  We will respond within 3 business days.

 

This website and the messages contained in its webpages are funded by customers unless otherwise noted.
